revision.comment: add "harosa" as per talk page request
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:Autotaxobox|removeQualifier|{{Delink|{{{1|}}}}} }} }} |animalia|animal = rgb(235,235,210) |archaea|nanoarchaeota|nanarchaeota|euryarchaeota|crenarchaeota|thaumarchaeota|korarchaeota = rgb(195,245,250) |archaeplastida|plantae|plant|viridiplantae = rgb(180,250,180) |bacteria|firmicutes|eubacteria = rgb(220,235,245) |eukaryota|eukarya|excavata|excavates|protista|protists|amoebozoa|opisthokonta|choanozoa = rgb(245,215,255) |fungi = rgb(145,250,250) |ichnos = rgb(230,222,214) |incertae sedis|''incertae sedis''|acritarcha = rgb(250,240,230) |sar|chromalveolata|harosa = rgb(200,250,80) |veterovata = rgb(250,250,220) |virus|viruses|i|ii|iii|iv|v|vi|vi/vii|vii|viii|viroid|viroids = rgb(250,250,190) |life|=transparent |#default = {{Taxobox/Error colour}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{template doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to get rid of some red links from probably deleted pages
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:Autotaxobox|removeQualifier|{{Delink|{{{1|}}}}} }} }} |animalia|animal = rgb(235,235,210) |archaea|nanoarchaeota|nanarchaeota|euryarchaeota|crenarchaeota|thaumarchaeota|korarchaeota = rgb(195,245,250) |archaeplastida|plantae|plant|viridiplantae = rgb(180,250,180) |bacteria|firmicutes|eubacteria = rgb(220,235,245) |eukaryota|eukarya|excavata|excavates|protista|protists|amoebozoa|opisthokonta|choanozoa = rgb(245,215,255) |fungi = rgb(145,250,250) |ichnos = rgb(230,222,214) |incertae sedis|''incertae sedis''|acritarcha = rgb(250,240,230) |sar|chromalveolata|harosa = rgb(200,250,80) |veterovata = rgb(250,250,220) |virus|viruses|i|ii|iii|iv|v|vi|vi/vii|vii|viii|viroid|viroids = rgb(250,250,190) |life|=transparent |#default = {{Taxobox/Error colour}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{template doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

revision.comment: updated to tested sandbox version, which simplifies splitting qualified taxon names
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{#titleparts:{{Delink|{{{1|}}}}}|1|1}} }} |animalia|animal = rgb(235,235,210) |archaea|nanoarchaeota|nanarchaeota|euryarchaeota|crenarchaeota|thaumarchaeota|korarchaeota = rgb(195,245,250) |archaeplastida|plantae|plant|viridiplantae = rgb(180,250,180) |bacteria|firmicutes|eubacteria = rgb(220,235,245) |eukaryota|eukarya|excavata|excavates|protista|protists|amoebozoa|opisthokonta|choanozoa = rgb(245,215,255) |fungi = rgb(145,250,250) |ichnos = rgb(230,222,214) |incertae sedis|''incertae sedis''|acritarcha = rgb(250,240,230) |sar|chromalveolata|harosa = rgb(200,250,80) |veterovata = rgb(250,250,220) |virus|viruses|i|ii|iii|iv|v|vi|vi/vii|vii|viii|viroid|viroids = rgb(250,250,190) |life|=transparent |#default = {{Taxobox/Error colour}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{template doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{#titleparts:{{Delink|{{{1|}}}}}|1|1}} }} |animalia|animal = rgb(235,235,210) |archaea|nanoarchaeota|nanarchaeota|euryarchaeota|crenarchaeota|thaumarchaeota|korarchaeota = rgb(195,245,250) |archaeplastida|plantae|plant|viridiplantae = rgb(180,250,180) |bacteria|firmicutes|eubacteria = rgb(220,235,245) |eukaryota|eukarya|excavata|excavates|protista|protists|amoebozoa|opisthokonta|choanozoa = rgb(245,215,255) |fungi = rgb(145,250,250) |ichnos = rgb(230,222,214) |incertae sedis|''incertae sedis''|acritarcha = rgb(250,240,230) |sar|chromalveolata|harosa = rgb(200,250,80) |veterovata = rgb(250,250,220) |virus|viruses|i|ii|iii|iv|v|vi|vi/vii|vii|viii|viroid|viroids = rgb(250,250,190) |life|=transparent |#default = {{Taxobox/Error colour}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{template doc}}</noinclude>
